name: MyZoo Solar Wall Mounted Cat Shelf
description: Give the light of your life a worthy perch with the MyZoo Solar Wall Mounted Cat Shelf. This sun-shaped shelf provides a comfortably curved perching spot that lets your kitty sit up high like the sun in the sky. The slotted platform gives a good grip for walking or jumping and makes a purr-fect spot for taking a nap. Use it alone or with other wall-mounted cat perches to create a space-saving vertical play and lounge space for your best friend!
